name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

VARIABLES num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum

Init == /\ num = 0
       /\ flag = 0
       /\ maxFlag = 0
       /\ maxNum = 0

Next == /\ num' = IF flag' THEN num ELSE num' + 1
       /\ flag' = IF flag THEN flag ELSE flag' + 1
       /\ maxNum' = IF maxFlag' THEN maxNum ELSE maxNum' + 1
       /\ maxFlag' = IF maxFlag THEN maxFlag ELSE maxFlag' + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag, maxFlag, maxNum>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, count

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K. *)
(* head and tail are indices into the sequence. *)
(* count is the number of elements in the queue. *)

(* The queue is full when count = K. *)
(* The queue is empty when count = 0. *)

(* The queue is a sequence of length K. *)
(* The elements are stored in queue[head], queue[head+1], ..., queue[tail-1] modulo K. *)

(* The initial state: empty queue. *)
Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

(* The producer action: enqueue an element e. *)
Enqueue(e) == /\ count < K
             /\ queue' = [i \in 1..K |-> IF i = tail THEN e ELSE queue[i]]
             /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
             /\ count' = count + 1
             /\ head' = head

(* The consumer action: dequeue an element. *)
Dequeue == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ queue' = queue

(* The next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue. *)
Next == \/ /\ \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e)
      \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<queue, head, tail, count>>

(* Type checking: queue is a sequence of length K, head and tail are integers in 1..K, count is an integer in 0..K. *)
TypeOK == /\ queue \in [1..K -> 1..K]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY
VARIABLES channel, retransmit_count, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            [chunk \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> file[CHUNK_SIZE * (i-1) + chunk]]

            [chunk \in 1..(FILE_SIZE - CHUNK_SIZE * (Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)-1)) |-> 
                file[CHUNK_SIZE * (Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE)-1) + chunk]]]
    /\ sent_chunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmit_count = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ channel \in Seq
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : 
        /\ i \notin 1..Len(sent_chunks)
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ sent_chunks' = Append(sent_chunks, i)
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..Len(sent_chunks) :
        /\ i \notin 1..Len(retransmit_count)
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, 0)
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..Len(retransmit_count) :
        /\ retransmit_count[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[sent_chunks[i]])
        /\ retransmit_count' = Append(retransmit_count, retransmit_count[i] + 1)
    \/ /\ \E i \in 1..Len(channel) :
        /\ channel' = Tail(channel)
        /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks
        /\ retransmit_count' = retransmit_count

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_count, channel>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmit_count \in Seq
    /\ channel \in Seq

====
